name: Confederation of Trade Unions of Armenia
Farm Credit Armenia Universal Credit Organization Commercial Cooperative (FCA UCO CC)
description: Farm Credit Armenia is a financial co-operative. Its members are rural inhabitants, farmers, private enterprises and others for agricultural production, food processing and other agriculture related activities. They offer agricultural loans, agribusiness loans, SME loans and leasing of agricultural machinery and equipment.In 2010, FCA had 350 individual members. There are 5,313 individual members as at the end of 2015 in the cooperative, 18% of which are youth, and 15% of which are women. FCA has 65 employees as of the end of 2015.
